basic_details.job_title: SSB Odisha Librarian Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 225 Posts
basic_details.short_information: SSB Odisha Librarian Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 225 vacancies across Odisha. Candidates with B.Lib Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 27-04-2026, and closes on 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through SSB Odisha website, ssbodisha.ac.in.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 9 of Pay Matrix under ORSP Rules, 2017

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must apply online only. The step-by-step process is as follows:
seo_tags: State Selection Board Odisha Librarian Recruitment 2026
